name: Cranberry Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Bake the sweet potatoes until soft.
2. In a saucepan, combine orange juice concentrate and cranberries. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until cranberries pop and sauce thickens.
4. Stir in sweetener if desired.
5. Cut off tops of sweet potatoes and press open from the bottom.
6. Spoon cranberry orange sauce over each potato.
